note: The project owner explicitly requested sanitized Devpost screenshots, English captions, repository documentation updates, and publication to zyganali-glitch/codex-control-tower in the active Codex session. Evaluator-driven narrative or product changes remain subject to a separate agreement.
scope: Complete bounded release-preflight hardening, run local verification, commit the independent repository, and push main to the user-provided GitHub repository.
forbiddenActions: modify or push to any protected source repository
commit credentials, tokens, private URLs, or private screenshots
claim NOT_RUN or SIMULATED evidence as PASS
publish to a destination other than the approved GitHub repository
disclaimer: Local session approval; not enterprise identity verification or a signed authorization.
